title: The Yonghy-Bonghy-Bo
content:
The Yonghy-Bonghy-Bo,
    whose Head was ever so much bigger than his
    Body, and whose Hat was rather small.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Yonghy-Bonghy-Bo"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
